subcodes.first_line: O faithful friends of the Blessed Beauty! By reason of your attraction, fervor, enthusiasm and rapture, the dwellers in the Abhá Kingdom are moved to exultation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان باوفای جمال ابهی از جذب و شور و شوق و ولهتان اهل ملکوت ابهی باواز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
